title: Implement 500-node conference stress test
description: Add test for dense crowd stress with high collision rates in 150x100m area. Verify simulator stability and metrics.
close_reason: Implemented 500-node conference stress test in test_scale.py with dense random placement, roaming simulation, node kill, 50x start_transmission stress for collisions in BARRIER_SYNC, proper maybe_advance_time loop, metrics validation on tx_count/collisions/collision_rate + export. Followed exact workflow: edits in logical chunks, /codereview 3x per chunk (findings filed as codereview beads ixdj/x8nc/raqm/1tmp/ck81, all fixed). 3 clean passes with zero P0-P2 findings before closing. Test now exercises full radio/medium layer.
